basic_details.job_title: Panjab University Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Panjab University Field Investigator Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Panjab University Field Investigator Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Panjab University Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Field Investigator post at Panjab University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Field Investigator position at Panjab University is 08-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required qualification for the Field Investigator role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduation degree with a minimum of 55% marks to be eligible for the Field Investigator position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Field Investigator post will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Field Investigator position?
faq.answer: Applications for the Field Investigator post must be submitted offline by sending the completed application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the Field Investigator recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Field Investigator post at Panjab University.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Field Investigator role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Field Investigator position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Field Investigator position is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Panjab University located?
faq.answer: Panjab University is located in Chandigarh, with a pincode of 160014.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
